3042060.name: Legend of the Moon
3042060.description:
-Classic dungeon exploring action RPG

-For those who get sick and tired of endless and meaningless level up
we developed it so they can get nostalgic about the moment you held a controller to see the ending part when young.

-It is a metroidvania genre game.
-action platformer game, collect spirits, learn skills and kill the moon!!
-It provides cool action to destroy the pouring enemies.
-With the story of moving towards the moon
-unique map composition and level design

-Data is not consumed during play.
-If you use ‘Stab’ attack in [Game Tip] well, it will make you run the game more smoothly.
3042060.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 韩语
